message:
Enhance ASCII 3D renderer with multi-quality gradient system

Implement a comprehensive quality-based rendering system for the ASCII
3D phage model visualization with the following improvements:

Quality Levels:
- low: 10-character ASCII gradient for minimal terminal bandwidth
- medium: 16-character gradient (new default) for balanced detail
- high/ultra: 70-character industry-standard ASCII art gradient for
  maximum fidelity and smooth shading transitions

New Rendering Modes:
- Add block character gradients (░▒▓█) for Unicode-capable terminals
- Support detailed block gradient variant for ultra quality mode
- Introduce RenderQuality type for type-safe quality selection

Brightness Calculation Improvements:
- Normalize depth-based brightness using actual Z-range (1.5 to 4.5)
- Vertices now render brighter (0.5-1.0 range) than edges (0.2-0.7)
  to create visual hierarchy and depth perception
- Add bounds checking to prevent charIndex out-of-range errors

Code Cleanup:
- Remove unused Matrix4 import and transformedVertices array
- Remove unused step counter in line drawing algorithm
- Simplify gradient selection through new selectGradient() helper

The 70-character ASCII gradient follows the industry standard used in
high-quality ASCII art generators, providing smooth luminosity
transitions from empty space through punctuation, letters, and dense
block characters.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
